sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_regexp_quote_meta (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_regexp_quote_meta SET name = regexpQuoteMeta(name) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, regexpQuoteMeta(name) AS escaped_name FROM test_regexp_quote_meta;
INSERT INTO test_regexp_quote_meta (id, name) VALUES (2, 'Special chars: $, ^, *, +');
